text: As to a holder of a commercial driver’s license as defined in section 42-2-402 or the operator of a commercial motor vehicle as defined in section 42-2-402 , a court shall not defer imposition of judgment or allow a person to enter into a diversion program that would prevent a driver’s conviction for any violation, in any type of motor vehicle, of a traffic control law from appearing on the driver’s record.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-1719 — Violations

As to a holder of a commercial driver’s license as defined in section 42-2-402 or the operator of a commercial motor vehicle as defined in section 42-2-402 , a court shall not defer imposition of judgment or allow a person to enter into a diversion program that would prevent a driver’s conviction for any violation, in any type of motor vehicle, of a traffic control law from appearing on the driver’s record.

subsections.text: As to a holder of a commercial driver’s license as defined in section 42-2-402 or the operator of a commercial motor vehicle as defined in section 42-2-402 , a court shall not defer imposition of judgment or allow a person to enter into a diversion program that would prevent a driver’s conviction for any violation, in any type of motor vehicle, of a traffic control law from appearing on the driver’s record.
